prompt: An audit across the deterministic value-lever packages found correctness and honesty bugs in @prune/allowance-market, @prune/bounty, @prune/price-tag, @prune/task-ledger, and @prune/waterbed. Each package has updated tests; some currently fail. Fix every finding so all five packages' updated suites pass.
oracleCmd: (cd packages/allowance-market && npx vitest run src/market.test.ts) && (cd packages/bounty && npx vitest run src/bounty.test.ts) && (cd packages/price-tag && npx vitest run src/price-tag.test.ts) && (cd packages/task-ledger && npx vitest run src/ledger.test.ts) && (cd packages/waterbed && npx vitest run src/gate.test.ts)
notes: Reference: fix audit findings batch 1+2 2026-06-07, restricted to the five packages with paired impl+test changes. Wide-but-shallow cross-package task.
